name: Kurier
description: Submit zero-knowledge proofs for on-chain verification via zkVerify. Supports multiple proof types including groth16, plonky2, risc0, fflonk, ultraplonk, sp1, ultrahonk, and ezkl.

endpoints.description: Submit a zero-knowledge proof for on-chain verification via zkVerify
Register a verification key on-chain and receive a vkHash
Generate a verifiable random hash backed by a zero-knowledge proof (testnet only)
Query available endpoints and their current prices

rateLimit: 60 requests per minute per wallet address
